title: Welcome to the HMF Blog
excerpt: After 10 years of House Music Fridays at Air Conditioned Lounge, we're launching a blog to share recaps, announcements, and stories from the dancefloor.
body:
After 10 years of House Music Fridays at Air Conditioned Lounge, we're launching a blog to share recaps, announcements, and stories from the dancefloor.

Stay tuned for event recaps, guest DJ spotlights, behind-the-scenes stories, and more. Every Friday night at AC Lounge — the only place for true House Music heads in San Diego.
